query:
SELECT d.code AS duck_code, d.name AS duck_name, v.name AS vessel_name,
                   s.seen_at AS "seen_at: jiff_sqlx::Timestamp"
            FROM sighting s
            JOIN duck d ON d.id = s.duck_id
            JOIN vessel v ON v.id = s.vessel_id
            WHERE s.user_id = $1
            ORDER BY s.seen_at DESC
